user.title: Intercom Native
user.description: PBX-lite intercom between ESPHome peers and Home Assistant. Routes calls peer-to-peer or via HA as a switchboard.

data_description.use_tcp: Framed binary protocol (audio + signaling on a single connection).
data_description.use_udp: Raw PCM audio with framed control signaling on a separate port.
data_description.udp_control_port: Listen port for UDP signaling (default 6055). Must differ from the audio port.
data_description.advertise_host: Optional override published in ESP phonebooks. Use this when HA is behind routing, NAT, LXC, VPN, or multiple subnets and the automatically announced address is not reachable by ESP devices.

error.udp_ports_must_differ: UDP audio port and UDP control port must differ.
